name: Nike Waffle Debut
description: Retro gets modernized in the Nike Waffle Debut. Remember that smooth nylon and suede combination...

name: Nike Tech
description: Crafted with stretchy, breathable material, the Nike Tech Woven Jacket offers a supportive fit and feel.

description: The Nike Elite Crew Basketball Socks offer a supportive fit and feel with targeted cushioning.

name: Nike P-6000
description: The Nike P-6000 draws on the 2006 Nike Air Pegasus, bringing a mashup of Pegasus history to life.

name: Men's Fleece Cargo Pants
